MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: DEFENDANT RAVIL A. MUKHAMEDIYEV'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is denied without prejudice. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
***Matter recalled, the court vacates its earlier ruling and takes DEFENDANT RAVIL A. MUKHAMEDIYEV'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION off calendar. Per the San Francisco Sheriff's Department, this matter has been settled. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-04-2013 Off Calendar
